activities_projects.title: Square Pattern Investigation
steps: Find the difference between consecutive squares
Identify and explain the pattern observed

activities_projects.title: Prime Factor Square Root Method
activities_projects.objective: Find square roots using prime factorisation
steps: Group factors into pairs to find square roots
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies prime factorisation for square roots

activities_projects.title: Cube Root Challenge
steps: Write cube numbers such as 512, 729 and 1728
Group the factors in sets of three to find cube roots

activities_projects.title: Area and Square Relationship
activities_projects.objective: Relate square numbers to area of squares
steps: Draw squares with sides 3 cm, 5 cm and 7 cm
Explain how the areas represent square numbers

activities_projects.title: Volume and Cube Investigation
steps: Explain how this represents a cube number

activities_projects.title: Nearest Perfect Square Estimation
activities_projects.objective: Estimate square roots of non-perfect squares

activities_projects.title: Square vs Cube Growth Analysis
activities_projects.objective: Compare growth of squares and cubes
steps: Analyse which grows faster and explain why

activities_projects.title: Perfect Square Puzzle
steps: Create puzzles where a number must be made a perfect square

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Cube Applications
activities_projects.objective: Apply cube concept in daily life
steps: Calculate their volumes using cube formula
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies cube numbers to real-life contexts
